title: tina fruit orchard under pavement
prompt: Use Image 1 as the edit target and preserve Tina, identity, wardrobe, pose, candy, package, car interior, camera, and neighborhood perspective. Image 2 supports identity and product only. Outside the window, one long section of ordinary asphalt lifts gently as a flexible surface. Beneath the street is not dirt but a mature luminous tropical orchard compressed under the city, mango trees springing upward into daylight with glowing jewel fruit and deep green leaves. Show a clean cross-section at the lifted street edge. Tina watches from the back seat. Monumental but benign revelation, photographic street detail, no paper backing, no anatomical material, no text.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Generate exploratory cinematic candy-commercial styleframes. Follow the stated role of each reference image. When Image 1 is named as the edit target, preserve its subject, face, wardrobe, car interior, camera position, and photographic realism unless the prompt explicitly changes them. Avoid captions, panel borders, watermarks, generic candyland, and random rainbow effects.
